title: Vegan Tagine Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew made with a variety of ingredients, inspired by North African cuisine. This dish is perfect for a chilly evening or a special occasion.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the onions and cook until they are translucent.
Add the garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the tagine, chickpeas, parsley, lemon juice, and spices. Stir well.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
